Build-Depends-Indep: python3-argcomplete <!nocheck>, python3-doc <!nodoc>, python3-myst-parser <!nodoc>, python3-pydata-sphinx-theme <!nodoc>, python3-pytest <!nocheck>, python3-pytest-mock <!nocheck>, python3-sphinx, python3-sphinx-rtd-theme <!nodoc>
